It's our SEO tool.
It's basically on a scale from 0 to 100, and everything that's like under 20.
Is possible even with a fairly new website, a fairly low domain authority.
So it's an idea to consider.

Yeah, I can jump in.
Because I hated doing this as a lawyer.
So pretty much every few years you have to do, I think in California was 25 hours of like ongoing education credit.
They do have to be certified so I can't just watch any webinar online or something.
It does need to be an accredited sort of thing.
So for our classes, we are accredited in California for I think 1.25 hours of California hours.

So if someone comes to one of our live classes, afterwards, if they email us and they send us their California bar number, we can send them the sort of paperwork they need in order to get their credit.
And then when your bar license is up for like renewal, then you have to show, yes, I'm also up to date on my 25 hours.
So it does vary on state.
It's not like city.
So California has their versions.
And one thing that's tricky is it is a total mixed bag on what.
States approve which content.

So right now we're only approved in California, but there's other places that say, oh, if it's good in California, it's also good in Missouri or for, I don't know, but, and so they kind of give like reciprocity.
Other ones don't do that.
And you have to be individually approved in those locations.
So it does really depend why everything is broken out by like Alabama and all that.

So I do know they will really like this because one thing Cecilia is very into at some point is our own sort of AI academy, which can be like a law line where someone could go and hopefully fulfill all of their education credit by just landing in like the GC AI academy.
I know that is like a long-term goal, but this is something that I know Cecilia and Alessandra are very into.

So I do think it's a really good angle for our kind of people.
Yeah.
Okay.
You know what?

I do think those deadlines probably shift around.

So we'll change based on year on like the deadlines and also like reporting requirements.
It seems like there are probably a couple of like tiered approaches.

And then also what we can do that's slightly a little bit more manual.

So if we know that there are going to be changes that we want to do, we want to look at it every year and make sure that we're not missing anything.

But I think it's relatively feasible to also use AI to determine, like, you know, this page at this time last year versus this page now, what has changed, and then determine if we need to make some adjustments and then just do a simple refresh.
And that's good for SEO, too.
That's a really good point.
I don't know if there's a way, like, if each embedded interactive, like, GPP widget or GCI widget can basically house the link where the information is coming from.
And basically, if somebody's coming on, like, give me the latest on this, if it's just.
Like, I'm sure that, like, through perplexity, like, that's super up-to-date.
So if we can find that source, like, this is going to be tough to compete with, obviously, Lawline, but our competitive advantage is the AI component of it.
So, and it's super, like, this is really well done.
If they want to do technology, like, you open it and they have all these courses, which is something also a simple AI search can do.

So I know this is, like, to develop something like this will take years, but I'm saying we can start somewhere, at least test a bunch of different things once we get scaling to see, like, what's working and what's not.
But, yeah.
And we can also, we'll pull in our engineering team and ask if they have any thoughts.

We can ingest all of this conversation and then kind of take it in-house.

But, yeah.
Cool.

I do also, yeah, I think even outside of the education credit stuff, I do think that making sure things are, like, accurate and timely, especially if there's going to be a lot of articles about, like, AI.

Claus, it'll make it with a beard because it's been trained on Santa Claus.

For sure.
Cool.

you.

Yeah, that's smart.
I didn't know they were, was that new?

Yeah, they did that for college students, so.
All right, you gotta, you actually, you gotta get them.
about that for law school students.

So that would be such a long play.
Like if they're in law school, they pass the bars and they probably go work at a firm for four or five years, then maybe they jump in house.
So that would be like a major play.
But something we've talked about.
Yeah.
Very cool.
Yeah, makes sense.
Well, awesome.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GC-AI and GrowthX teams to discuss ongoing projects, content strategy, and technical issues.](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX team to gain access to GC-AI's CMS for content posting; Surbhi to share existing tutorial video](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Exploring CLE (Continuing Legal Education) content as a potential programmatic SEO opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Discussed challenges and strategies for keeping AI-related content up-to-date](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Addressing Google Search Console alerts post-domain change from getgc.ai to gc.ai](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)

## Topics

### CLE Content Strategy

  - [CLE requirements vary by state, not city; typically 25 hours every few years (e.g., California)](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)
  - [GC-AI currently accredited for 1.25 hours in California](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [Potential for programmatic SEO pages for each state's CLE requirements](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Idea: Interactive tool/widget for CLE information, starting with 5 pre-programmed states](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Challenge: Keeping content up-to-date as requirements change](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [Solution ideas:](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
      - ["Last updated" notifications](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
      - [Automated database updates](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
      - [Regular manual checks (e.g., yearly)](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
      - [Potential AI-assisted content comparison for updates](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)

### GC-AI Platform Access

  - [Elvis set up an account; Ryan to assist with whitelisting process](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [14-day free trial available for full access](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Elvis to send admin email for organization setup](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)

### Content Management System (CMS) Access

  - [Surbhi to share existing tutorial video from Alessandra](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [If needed, can book additional time for specific questions](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [GrowthX team needs access to CMS for content posting](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)

### Google Search Console Alert

  - [Alert received after domain change to gc.ai](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Some search results still showing old getgc.ai domain](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [Permanent redirects are set up and working](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
  - [May resolve itself over time as Google re-crawls the site](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [GrowthX team to investigate further once given access to Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Elvis to send admin email for GC-AI platform organization setup](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Surbhi to share CMS tutorial video with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Ryan to request Search Console access for GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [GrowthX to investigate Google Search Console alert once access is granted](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [Mara to ping Alessandra about potential feedback on calibration articles](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [GrowthX team to follow up with more detailed CLE content strategy proposals](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)

action_items.description: Send GC.AI account email to Ryan for whitelisting
Share Alessandra's Loom video on CMS overview with Elvis
Review CMS Loom video, reply with any questions or booking request for further clarification
Ask CTO to set up GrowthX team as admin for Google Search Console
Research Google Search Console domain change alert, consult technical SEOs once access granted
Ping Alessandra re: potential feedback on calibration articles before next week's meeting
